rationale: Support question about connection data requirements; no spec rule involved.
Resync retryable writes YAML spec tests after format change and new error code tests.
Resync CRUD spec tests to add bulkWrite and 'ordered' option test cases.
Cross-driver coordination to add 'comment' parameter to aggregate; new feature rollout, not a spec violation.
Internal policy for copyright date format in headers; no spec area involved.
Spec requires change stream initial aggregate not be retried; drivers that retried needed correction.
Resync retryable writes spec tests; test infrastructure update coordinated across all drivers.
Re-sync transaction spec tests for new UnknownTransactionCommitResult label test cases.
Read preference spec change requiring unpin on preference change; proactive rollout, no existing violation stated.
Deprecate snapshot option and resync command monitoring tests per spec repo commit.
SDAM spec changed from ismaster to ping for idle socket check; prior spec was ambiguous on what to do with the response.
Spec updated: startAtOperationTime must be omitted at creation and use operationTime from initial aggregate on resume.
Resync transactions-convenient-api spec tests after SPEC-1208 removed wtimeout retry prohibition.
Spec used wrong parameter name rescanSRVFrequencyMS instead of rescanSRVIntervalMS; spec naming error.
Requesting transaction code examples for documentation pages; no spec conformance issue.
Community request to list Julia MongoDB driver on the ecosystem drivers webpage.
Deprecate parallelCollectionScan after server removed the command; no spec rule violated.
Connection string spec requires all RFC 3986 delimiters percent-encoded in username/password; drivers were too permissive.
Multiple bugs in FLE spec test files: wrong field names, missing options, incorrect test assertions.
Resync transaction spec tests to add session1 usage in operations and APM expectations.
Spec (SPEC-331) requires aggregate with $out be sent to primary; drivers needed to enforce this.
Resync transaction spec tests to verify only initial command includes readConcern.
Spec updated resumable error definition; drivers resync change stream tests with new NonRetryableChangeStreamError label.
Resync change stream spec tests to cover all new notification types added to spec.
Update change stream spec tests for 4.1.1 collection drop/rename notification changes.
Performance optimization: cache SCRAM ClientKey to reduce CPU during pool population; no spec rule violated.
Spec changed to require omitting bypassDocumentValidation when false; drivers were sending false value.
CMAP spec updated to add connectionError reason to ConnectionCheckOutFailedEvent; add spec tests.
CI infrastructure: enable MongoDB 4.2 testing in Evergreen; no spec conformance issue.
Spec test runner bug: outcome find should use local read concern to avoid missing w=1 writes.
Resync MONGODB-AWS auth test scripts to work around EC2 RequestLimitExceeded errors.
Investigation of server log field remoteOpWaitMillis; downstream impact assessment, no spec rule.
Server restricts reIndex to standalone; drivers update tests to skip on non-standalone; no spec violation.
New server feature: $out stage supports different database; driver support rollout, no prior spec rule.
New aggregation operator $accumulator; driver support rollout for new server feature.
Add single-endpoint OCSP certificates to drivers-evergreen-tools for drivers that hard-fail on unreachable endpoints.
CMAP spec removed wait queue size limit events; Java implemented correctly, other drivers need to remove the properties.
Auth spec silent on redacting AWS session token in error messages; filed to determine if spec should require it.
OCSP spec test README references tlsDisableOCSPEndpointCheck twice; ambiguous spec documentation error.
Resync SDAM spec tests to only examine non-unknown servers for topology incompatibility determination.
Add spec test verifying reads in transactions ignore db/collection readConcern per SPEC-1161.
Read preference specs reference 'addSpecial' which is undefined and unused; spec documentation gap.
Improve ECS IMDSv2 role check in AWS auth test scripts; CI infrastructure fix.
SDAM spec pseudocode uses >= vs > for topologyVersion staleness without explanation; needs clarification.
TCP keepalive enablement policy; infrastructure/configuration requirement, not a spec conformance issue.
Spec (SPEC-1232) requires countDocuments use $group with _id: 1; drivers using different grouping needed correction.
Documentation request for change stream output examples; no spec conformance issue.
Resync transaction spec tests to avoid readConcern snapshot failures on sharded clusters.
CRUD spec changed to require error on hint with unacknowledged writes for all server versions; drivers were too permissive.
listIndexNames.json expectations used wrong command name; resync spec test file to fix assertion.
